---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?
     Who else would benefit from this? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How should it work? Be as specific as you can.
     UI sketches, API examples, or pseudocode all welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Are there other ways to achieve this?
     Could it be done with existing features? -->

## Component

- [ ] Desktop App (Electron)
- [ ] VS Code Extension
- [ ] Python Backend (API)
- [ ] Upload flow
- [ ] Download flow
- [ ] Transfer progress
- [ ] Cache management
- [ ] Other: ___

## Would you be willing to contribute a PR for this?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement this
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
